ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Continued To Nov-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Jubilee Menzies, Esq. for Liberty DeLeon, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that it has Sheila Robello as counsel of record in this matter and inquired about Ms. Menzies' association. Ms. Menzies stated that she is an associate at Solan, Park & Robello. The Court inquired as to why a petition has not been filed and further inquired as to what kind of petition could the Court expect to be filed. Ms. Menzies stated that they have a petition to terminate the estate prepared, that the petition to terminate has been sent out to their client for signature, and that they would need a 30-day continuance to get it done and on file.

At the conclusion Ms. Menzies' comments, the Court continued today's status on close of the estate to November 28, 2023.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.
